main.description: Publish a new bud. The parent may be another bud (continuation) or a seed (planting a root bud). The caller must be signed in. The AppView writes an ink.branchline.bud record to the caller's PDS and mirrors it into the local read cache so the new bud is immediately navigable. Rejection reasons mirror ink.branchline.bud create validation — 500-word limit on `text`, 24h parent growing window, self-reply, seed chain/expiry/grantee checks, etc.

parentUri.description: AT-URI of the parent — either an ink.branchline.bud (continuation) or an ink.branchline.seed (root bud being planted).

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The caller is not signed in.

errors.name: ParentNotFound
errors.description: The parent (bud or seed) does not exist in the AppView.

errors.name: ParentCidMismatch
errors.description: The resolved parent's CID does not match the value on the record.

errors.name: SelfReply
errors.description: The caller is the parent bud's author. Buds cannot continue themselves.

errors.name: ParentGrowing
errors.description: The parent bud is still inside its 24h growing window.

errors.name: WordLimitExceeded
errors.description: The bud text exceeds the 500-word ceiling.

errors.name: InvalidFormatting
errors.description: A formatting span is malformed — offsets out of bounds, start >= end, or an unknown span type.

errors.name: NotSeedGrantee
errors.description: The caller is not the grantee of the seed they are trying to plant.

errors.name: SeedChainBroken
errors.description: The seed's ancestor chain is missing, expired, or broken by a grantor/grantee mismatch.

errors.name: SeedAlreadyPlanted
errors.description: Another bud has already been planted from this seed.
